sentence_window:

--- PAGE 125 ---
(19) Any portion of the issue proceeds that is proposed to be paid by the issuer
to the promoter, directors or key managerial personnel of the issuer. (20) Relationship of the promoter or directors of the issuer with the entities from
whom the issuer has acquired or proposes to acquire land in the last 5 years, along
with the relevant details. (21) Excessive dependence on any key managerial personnel for the project for
which the issue is being made. (22) Any material investment in debt instruments by the issuer which are
unsecured. (23) Non-provision for decline in the value of investments.
